DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE ON THE COURT'S MOTION. THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THE ISSUES RAISED IN PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM ARE THE SUBJECT OF SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT CASE {NO. 448878}, AND THE INTERLOCUTORY JUDGMENT ENTERED IN THAT ACTION. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM RELATED TO AN ACCOUNTING OF INCOME AND EXPENSES FROM THE SUBJECT REAL PROPERTY, AND ANY DISTRIBUTION OF FUNDS, SHOULD BE ADDRESSED IN THAT CASE. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY 18, 2010 ORDERED DESTROYED.
